name: rhombic_dodecahedron
description: Rhombic dodecahedron (Catalan dual of the cuboctahedron). 14 vertices = 8 three-valent (cube corners at (±1, ±1, ±1)) + 6 four-valent (octahedral positions at (±2, 0, 0) and cyclic perms), 24 edges, 12 rhombic faces. Space-filling polyhedron whose natural tiling (rhombic-dodecahedral honeycomb) has 3 tiles meeting at every edge (dihedral angle 120°), 4 tiles meeting at each three-valent vertex, 6 tiles meeting at each four-valent vertex. corona_1 has 18 neighbours: 12 face-sharers + 6 vertex-sharers at the 4-valent positions. scale_denom=1, all integer ZPhi.
